heading: Notification of account deficiencies
label: 3532 Notification of account deficiencies
text: An accounting official discovering a deficiency in an account of an official of the United States Government having custody of public money shall notify the head of the agency having jurisdiction of the official of the kind and amount of the deficiency.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)353231:497a., , .June 6, 1972Pub. L. 92–310, § 26086 Stat. 215The word “official” is substituted for “officers”, and the word “Government” is added, for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code. The words “having custody of public money” are substituted for “or in the accounts of any officer disbursing or chargeable with public money” for clarity and consistency. The words “immediately” and “the affairs of . . . or officer” are omitted as surplus.
